_comment: Item catalog. Types: Consumable, StatBoost, Evolution, Cosmetic, Pokeball, MoveBook, TicketRefill. MoveBook items teach a specific move to a pet. TicketRefill items grant hunt/battle tickets.

items.name: Potion
items.description: Restores 20 HP to a pet.

items.name: Super Potion
items.description: Restores 50 HP to a pet.

items.name: Hyper Potion
items.description: Restores 100 HP to a pet.

items.name: Max Potion
items.description: Fully restores HP to a pet.

items.name: Attack Boost
items.description: Permanently increases attack by 10.

items.name: Defense Boost
items.description: Permanently increases defense by 10.

items.name: Speed Boost
items.description: Permanently increases speed by 10.

items.name: Rare Candy
items.description: Instantly increases pet level by 1.

items.name: Fire Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Fire-type Pokemon evolve. It has a fiery orange color.

items.name: Water Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Water-type Pokemon evolve. It has a deep blue color.

items.name: Thunder Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Electric-type Pokemon evolve. It has a yellow color with lightning patterns.

items.name: Leaf Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Grass-type Pokemon evolve. It has a verdant green color.

items.name: Moon Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Pokemon evolve. It glows softly with moonlight.

items.name: Sun Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Pokemon evolve. It radiates warmth like sunlight.

items.name: Ice Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Ice-type Pokemon evolve. It is cold to the touch.

items.name: Dusk Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain Dark-type Pokemon evolve. It holds shadows within.

items.name: Pet Shampoo
items.description: Makes your pet sparkle and boosts mood.

items.name: Pokeball
items.description: A standard device for catching wild Pokemon. Has a moderate catch rate.

items.name: Great Ball
items.description: An improved Pokeball with a higher catch rate than a standard Pokeball.

items.name: Ultra Ball
items.description: A high-performance Pokeball with an excellent catch rate.

items.name: TM Flamethrower
items.description: Teaches the move Flamethrower to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Thunderbolt
items.description: Teaches the move Thunderbolt to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Surf
items.description: Teaches the move Surf to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Solar Beam
items.description: Teaches the move Solar Beam to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Ice Beam
items.description: Teaches the move Ice Beam to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Psychic
items.description: Teaches the move Psychic to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Shadow Ball
items.description: Teaches the move Shadow Ball to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Dragon Claw
items.description: Teaches the move Dragon Claw to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Brick Break
items.description: Teaches the move Brick Break to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Sludge Bomb
items.description: Teaches the move Sludge Bomb to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Aerial Ace
items.description: Teaches the move Aerial Ace to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM X-Scissor
items.description: Teaches the move X-Scissor to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Dark Pulse
items.description: Teaches the move Dark Pulse to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Body Slam
items.description: Teaches the move Body Slam to a Pokemon.

items.name: TM Hyper Beam
items.description: Teaches the move Hyper Beam to a Pokemon.

items.name: Hunt Ticket Pack
items.description: Instantly refills all hunt tickets to maximum.

items.name: Battle Ticket Pack
items.description: Instantly refills all battle tickets to maximum.

items.name: Full Ticket Bundle
items.description: Refills both hunt and battle tickets to maximum. Best value!
